calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-26-2026 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-26-2025 Set For Trial On May-18-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-16-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT.

Defendant City and County of San Francisco's Demurrer to the First Amended Complaint is OVERRULED.

(see word minutes for ful details).

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-22-2025 Continued To Jul-09-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-19-2025 Continued To May-14-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2025 Continued To Mar-12-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-17-2025 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant City and County of San Francisco's demurrer to the complaint is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff Daniel Powell is given leave to file an amended complaint no later than February 13, 2025. If Mr. Powell chooses to file an amended complaint, he must allege ultimate facts supporting each cause of action and must also allege ultimate facts showing that he complied with the claims filing requirements of the Government Code or that he is excused from doing so.

Order signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Reported by For The Record. (302/HEK)

LAW AND MOTION
Off Calendar Jan-17-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF DANIEL POWELL's MOTION TO STRIKE DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Mr. Powell's motion to strike the demurrer is denied since it is wholly lacking in merit.

Order signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Reported by For The Record. (302/HEK)

MOTION TO STRIKE DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-15-2025 Continued To Jan-17-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF DANIEL POWELL's MOTION TO STRIKE DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Continued to January 17, 2025 to be heard concurrently with the demurrer as required by CCP 435(b)(3).

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Reported by For the Record.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2024 Continued To Jan-29-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
